author: claude
content: the-hater verdict (datadir/hater-1207.md): #1207 is a NO-OP. Legacy is injected as an inline <script>, so its frames are attributed to the page URL, not moz-extension://. Repro (real bundle, with+without fix) is byte-identical; the new test is tautological. Recommend closing #1207 + #53 as not-reproducible-via-this-vector.
